item.title: Propaganda is sneaky and I don’t actually think all of the organisations I name or allude to in this are literally being paid or...
item.description:
Propaganda is sneaky and I don’t actually think all of the organisations I name or allude to in this are literally being paid or will be paid once you recognise what the people being paid want to say and believe that it becomes all the more dangerous with the people that aren’t being paid say



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Movements agaisnt soemthing are not enough, and are actually quite dangerous
item.description:
Movements agaisnt soemthing are not enough, and are actually quite dangerous. I know this is just a trend but it’s a dangerous effect in that trend



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Just as Rhodesian soldiers hit their face at the end of their harm, is Israeli soldiers and making a habit of doing so the same ...
item.description:
Just as Rhodesian soldiers hit their face at the end of their harm, is Israeli soldiers and making a habit of doing so the same not because they were actually facing real comparable threats to the level of crimes they are committing, but because there is minor consistent effective social pushback



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: He also supports Israel, also tax deductions typically are ignored by people who could use them because of education
item.description:
He also supports Israel, also tax deductions typically are ignored by people who could use them because of education. Oh my God, this is actually such like a multifaceted bad idea.#greenscreenvideo

item.title: Bourgeois decadence is a strong word for sparkly things to make you forget that you can’t pay for healthcare
item.description:
